name: Etsy sellers processing 5–15 invoices/month tool
description: For Etsy sellers processing 5–15 invoices/month, scattered financial data causes late tax submissions. We automate data collection instead of manual data entry into tax software.
problem_solved: Difficulty in accurately preparing tax returns due to scattered financial data.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Difficulty in accurately preparing tax returns due to scattered financial data.
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For Etsy sellers processing 5–15 invoices/month, scattered financial data causes late tax submissions. We automate data collection instead of manual data entry into tax software.
locked_fields.current_alternative: Manual data entry into tax software

one_liner: For Etsy sellers processing 5–15 invoices/month, scattered financial data causes late tax submissions. We automate data collection instead of manual data entry into tax software.
